channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Argentina triumphs over Switzerland in FIFA World Cup match, eyes semi-final clash with England
item.description: In a hard-fought encounter at the Arrowhead Stadium, Argentina secured a 3-1 victory against 10-man Switzerland after extra time, setting up a highly anticipated FIFA World Cup semi-final showdown aga...

item.title: Bellingham's brace helps England reach World Cup semifinals
item.description: England advanced to the World Cup semifinals after a thrilling 2-1 victory over Norway, thanks to Jude Bellingham's two goals. The match, held in Miami, saw Norway take an early lead through Andreas S...

item.title: Canadian Museum's Nakba exhibit oversimplifies 1948 Arab-Israeli war history
item.description: The article critiques the Canadian Museum of Human Rights' 'Palestine Uprooted: Nakba Past and Present' exhibit for presenting the 1948 Arab-Israeli war as an unprovoked Israeli expulsion of Palestini...

item.title: San Diego Padres Tie Series with Toronto Blue Jays in Thrilling 8-7 Decision
item.description: The San Diego Padres secured a dramatic 8-7 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays on Saturday night, evening the three-game series. Ty France hit a go-ahead home run in the sixth inning, while Manny Mach...

item.title: Tribute to Jayden Adams: South African Football Mourns Loss of Promising Midfielder
item.description: Jayden Adams, a 25-year-old Bafana Bafana and Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder, has passed away at the age of 25, leaving South African football in mourning. His death marks the end of a promising career ...

item.title: Mick Jagger's Philosophy on Entertainment: Focusing on Enjoyment Over Politics
item.description: In a recent interview with the New York Times podcast 'The Interview,' Mick Jagger, the 82-year-old frontman of The Rolling Stones, emphasized his role as an entertainer. He stated that his primary go...

item.title: Habagat Monsoon Brings Rains as Inday Leaves PAR
item.description: The southwest monsoon, known as 'Habagat,' will continue to bring rains over parts of the Philippines even after Tropical Storm Bavi (locally named Inday) exits the Philippine Area of Responsibility (...

item.title: Argentina advances to World Cup semi-finals after thrilling 3-1 win over Switzerland

item.title: Hot air balloon festival kicks off in Mildura with stunning aerial displays
item.description: The annual Balloons over Mildura festival in regional Victoria kicked off with a spectacular display of hot air balloons on Saturday, 11 July 2026. The event, which celebrates the unique cultural and ...

item.title: EFF Leader Julius Malema Faces Scrutiny Over WhatsApp Communications with Intelligence Official

item.title: 14 Countries Join Philippines in Urging China to Respect 2016 South China Sea Arbitral Award
item.description: The article highlights a joint statement released on July 12, 2026, by the Philippines and 13 other nations urging China to abide by the 2016 South China Sea Arbitral Award. The award, which ruled in ...

item.title: Tragedy at Girnar Pilgrimage: 11-Year-Old Boy Killed by Lion
item.description: An 11-year-old boy from Gujarat's Kheda district died after a lion attacked him near the Girnar staircase during a pre-dawn pilgrimage trek on Saturday. The incident occurred near the 50th step of the...

item.title: Arrest in connection with Widdecombe murder investigation
item.description: The article reports on a recent arrest linked to the murder case involving a prominent figure known as Widdecombe. While the details of the crime remain under investigation, authorities have confirmed...

item.title: Kaye Abad shares her cancer journey and the role of faith in overcoming adversity
item.description: Kaye Abad, a well-known Filipino personality, has shared her personal experience of battling cancer and how her faith in God played a crucial role in her recovery. In an interview, she emphasized the ...

item.title: Prince Harry participates in goat yoga during final public appearance
item.description: The Duke of Sussex engaged in a unique activity during his last public event of the week, joining a goat yoga session. This event, reported on July 12, 2026, highlights the Duke's continued involvemen...

item.title: Brazilian Influencer Dies in Dubai Fall; Family Calls for Respect
item.description: Brazilian influencer Kauana Bilhar, 26, died after falling from the 27th floor of a residential building in Dubai. Her mother, Darla Bilhar, broke her silence to urge people to stop spreading rumors a...

item.title: Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial Linked to Tacloban Shooting and School Violence
item.description: This article examines the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte, which is connected to the 2026 Tacloban school shooting incident. It highlights how factors like school violence, online ext...

item.title: Haaland says Norway's World Cup run has inspired a new generation despite quarter-final defeat to England
item.description: Erling Haaland said Norway's impressive performance at the 2026 FIFA World Cup should be remembered as the beginning of something bigger for the country, even though their campaign ended with a 2-1 ex...

item.title: Mass Shooting at Toronto Salsa Festival Leaves Two Dead, Four Injured
item.description: On July 11, 2026, a mass shooting occurred at the annual Salsa on St. Clair festival in Toronto, resulting in at least two fatalities and four injuries. The incident took place around 8 p.m. near St. ...

item.title: Weekly Aviation Updates and Travel News: July 11, 2026
